title: Brevo vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Brevo vs AWeber: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Brevo and AWeber comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while AWeber targets bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and multi-channel marketing
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo wins for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while AWeber is stronger for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point ($15/mo vs $25/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, switching from AWeber to Brevo is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
